scripts.test:e2e:ssr: rimraf .output && pnpm build && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:3000 'PW_EXPERIMENTAL_TS_ESM=1 npx playwright test --project=ssr'
scripts.test:e2e:spa: rimraf .output && pnpm build:spa && start-server-and-test preview:spa http://localhost:3000 'PW_EXPERIMENTAL_TS_ESM=1 npx playwright test --project=spa'
scripts.test:e2e:ssg: rimraf .output && pnpm generate && start-server-and-test preview http://localhost:3000 'PW_EXPERIMENTAL_TS_ESM=1 npx playwright test --project=ssg'
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm test:e2e:ssr && pnpm test:e2e:spa && pnpm test:e2e:ssg
